ham.subject: Your recent transaction on 15 Apr 2026 – INR 5,000
ham.body:
Dear [Name],

We have noticed a transaction of ₹5,000 from your savings account ending in 1234 on 15 Apr 2026. The transaction was made to "ABC Retail" at 10:45 AM.

If this was not authorized by you, please contact us immediately at 1800-XYZ-BANK.

Thank you for choosing XYZ Bank.

Best regards,
Customer Support Team
XYZ Bank

spam.subject: URGENT: Gift Card Request from CEO
spam.body:
Hi [Name],

This is [CEO Name], CEO of [Company]. As per the latest corporate policy, we need to issue a corporate gift card to you for your outstanding performance. Please provide your bank details and the card number to <URL> no later than 4 PM today.

Failure to comply will result in delayed bonuses and possible disciplinary action.

Thanks,
[CEO Name]
CEO, [Company]
